prompt: Heartbeat follow-up: inspect current context plus task-hall and any delegated/background work for this analysis session. If background results are ready, synthesize them with prior findings and continue only if useful pending work exists. If there is no active work, no claimable task, and no useful continuation, respond with AGENT_CLI_LIFECYCLE_END.
